mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news ( title, content, publish_date, publisher_id, is_notice, attachment_path, publish_status, schedule_time, news_type ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{publishDate}, #{publisherId}, #{isNotice}, #{attachmentPath}, #{publishStatus}, #{scheduleTime}, #{newsType} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE news
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
publish_date = #{publishDate},
publisher_id = #{publisherId},
is_notice = #{isNotice},
attachment_path = #{attachmentPath},
publish_status = #{publishStatus},
schedule_time = #{scheduleTime},
news_type = #{newsType},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news WHERE is_notice = 0 ORDER BY publish_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM news WHERE is_notice = 1 ORDER BY publish_date DESC
SELECT * FROM news ORDER BY publish_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news WHERE is_notice = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN is_notice = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noticeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_notice = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as newsCount, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as publishedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draftCount, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as scheduledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'CALL_FOR_PAPERS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as callForPapersCount, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'REGULAR_NEWS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as regularNewsCount, SUM(CASE WHEN news_type = 'SPECIAL_ISSUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as specialIssueCount FROM news
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM news WHERE id IN
#{id}
